heroImage: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/c4/BMW_Dinan_E39_M5_S62_engine_in_2008_team_SigalSport_Daytona_Prototype.jpg/1000px-BMW Dinan E39 M5 S62 engine in 2008 team SigalSport Daytona Prototype.jpg
heroCredit: Russell Mitt Tidwell II / CC BY-SA 3.0
description: The BMW M5, produced in six generations since 1985, is the definitive super saloon. The E28 pioneered the concept, the E39 perfected it with its 4.9-litre V8, and the E60 introduced a screaming 5.0-litre V10. The E39 generation is widely regarded as the greatest sports saloon ever made.
